paragraph: The woman stands in the office area with a big smile.  She is wearing eye glasses.  She is crossing her arms as she stand near the office chair.  She is wearing a dark gray sweater with dress slacks. The computer chair behind the woman has a coat on it.  The desk behind the woman has a computer on it with a few personal photos.  The desk also has lots of paper and a book on top.The wall behind the woman has a picture on it.  There is a black garbage can on the floor near the wall.
